item.name: Wind-up Cid
item.description:
When asked, if he had a granddaughter, what would he like to see her named, the Ironworks founder replied, “Gertrude.”

Use item to acquire the wind-up Cid minion.
item.tooltip:
Run, Cid. Or stay.
It makes no matter. You
cannot escape the past.
   - Gaius van Baelsar
item.specialactiondescription: Sets a trap which can be activated by button after 10 seconds. When triggered, it delivers an attack with a potency of 180 to all enemies within range.
